log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 10 (d20:10 + 0)
Dwarf — Bardic Musician: 9 (d20:7 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 50/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 35/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 17/67
⚡ Dwarf — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:4 total 14 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Dwarf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Dwarf — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Dwarf — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Dwarf — Bardic Musician for 6. HP: 23/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Dwarf — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Dwarf — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 11 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Dwarf — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Dwarf — Bardic Musician for 7. HP: 30/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
→ Concentration save: [11 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Dwarf — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
